item.title: 比特币跌至7日低点，因伊朗战争担忧推升油价
item.description: 比特币在亚洲早盘交易中跌至一周低点，因伊朗战争升级导致油价飙升。【原文：Bitcoin fell to its lowest price in a week during early Asia trading, as oil prices surged due to the escalating war with Iran.】

item.title: 油价飙升正蒙蔽印度银行盈利前景与利率走势
item.description: 瑞银：2027年3月前一年间，贷款机构利润可能下降4%至8%【原文：Lenders’ profits could fall by 4% to 8% in the year to March 2027: UBS】

item.title: 腾讯据称重启派拉蒙-华纳兄弟交易，携新资金回归
item.description: 据知情人士透露，腾讯控股有限公司计划投资数亿美元，参与派拉蒙天空舞公司对华纳兄弟探索公司的收购。【原文：Tencent Holdings Ltd. intends to invest several hundred million dollars in Paramount Skydance Corp.’s acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., according to people familiar with the situation.】

item.title: 中东股市较峰值下跌10%，因油价飙升、货币走低
item.description: 新兴市场股票指数较近期峰值下跌逾10%，因中东局势升级推高油价并削弱风险偏好。多数新兴市场货币兑美元汇率亦走弱，投资者纷纷寻求避险资产。【原文：An emerging-market stock index dropped more than 10% from its recent peak as escalating Middle East tensions drove oil prices sharply higher and dented risk appetite. Most emerging-market currencies also weakened against the dollar in a flight to safety.】

item.title: 印尼股市、印尼盾暴跌，伊朗冲突升级
item.description: 印尼股市与货币持续下挫，逼近新的熊市关口。中东冲突持续发酵拖累区域资产，加剧了市场对该国投资价值及政策方向的担忧。【原文：Indonesia’s stocks and currency slid toward new bearish milestones as rising Middle East conflict dragged on regional assets, compounding concerns over the country’s investability and policy direction.】

item.title: 中国国债暴跌，油价飙升加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 中国国债周一大幅下跌，加入全球债券抛售行列，因油价飙升引发对进口通胀的担忧。【原文：Chinese government bonds slumped on Monday, joining a global debt selloff as surging oil prices spur concern over imported inflation.】

item.title: 摩根士丹利称卡塔尔液化天然气停产抹去2026年供应盈余
item.description: 摩根士丹利表示，卡塔尔作为主要液化天然气出口国暂停生产，可能消除今年预计的大部分供应过剩。【原文：The halt of production in major liquefied natural gas exporter Qatar is likely to remove most of a glut forecast for this year, according to Morgan Stanley.】

item.title: 铝价攀升至2022年高点，伊朗战争加剧供应短缺
item.description: 铝价升至近四年高位，因中东地区冲突升级加剧了该地区供应前景的不确定性；与此同时，铜价及其他工业金属价格因风险偏好下降而下跌。【原文：Aluminum rose to the highest in almost four years as escalating hostilities in the Middle East worsened the supply outlook from the region, while copper and other industrial metals fell on falling risk appetite.】

item.title: 据称PAG正考虑出售鸡肉生产商凤翔
item.description: 知情人士透露，PAG正考虑出售家禽肉类生产商山东凤翔公司，此前该公司于去年被PAG私有化。【原文：PAG is considering a sale of poultry meat producer Shandong Fengxiang Co. after taking it private last year, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 复星股价反弹，因股东承诺增持股份
item.description: 复星国际有限公司股价在香港逆势反弹，一度上涨2.2%，此前控股股东承诺增持股份，缓解了投资者对年度亏损预计扩大五倍的担忧。【原文：Fosun International Ltd. shares reversed losses to climb as much as 2.2% in Hong Kong after controlling shareholders pledged to boost their holdings, easing investor concerns over a forecast fivefold widening of annual losses.】

item.title: 中国通胀率飙升，油价推高创纪录假日消费
item.description: 中国消费者价格涨幅加速至逾三年最高水平，同时工厂通缩再度放缓。此轮变化源于能源市场反弹以及农历新年假期推迟期间家庭消费的强劲增长。【原文：China’s consumer-price growth accelerated to the quickest in over three years and factory deflation moderated again, after a rally in energy markets and as household spending boomed during a later-than-usual Lunar New Year holiday.】

item.title: 日本面临滞胀风险加剧，油价突破百元，日元持续走弱
item.description: 油价飙升叠加日元疲软，使日本陷入滞胀的风险加剧。这促使政府加大财政支出力度，同时使央行将政策设置正常化的任务变得复杂。【原文：The surge in oil prices combined with a sagging yen raises the risk that Japan will slide into stagflation, prompting the government to ramp up fiscal spending while complicating the central bank’s mission to normalize its policy settings.】

item.title: 亚德尼将伊朗战争风险引发市场崩盘的概率上调至35%
item.description: 资深策略师埃德·亚德尼表示，随着伊朗局势升级冲击全球市场，美国股市今年面临急剧抛售的风险日益加剧。他更新了对所谓"快速变化时期"的展望。【原文：US stocks are facing a growing risk of a sharp selloff this year as the escalating war in Iran hurts global markets, according to veteran strategist Ed Yardeni, updating his outlook for what he describes as “fast-moving times.”】

item.title: 网球正迎来黄金时期。网球频道能否借势而上？
item.description: 一家面向网球铁杆粉丝的利基电视网络正试图借势网球运动日益增长的热度。【原文：A niche TV network for tennis diehards is trying to capitalize on growing interest in the sport】

item.title: 芝加哥大豆油价格飙升4%，原油涨势提振生物燃料需求
item.description: 芝加哥大豆油期货开盘暴涨逾4%，因中东冲突推高能源价格，提振了用于生产生物燃料的农作物需求。【原文：Chicago soybean oil prices futures surged more than 4% at the open, as a spike in energy prices driven by the conflict in the Middle East lifts demand for crops used in biofuel production.】

item.title: 韩国股市下跌，因伊朗战争引发油价飙升损害市场前景
item.description: 韩国股市下跌，延续上周跌势，因中东地缘政治紧张局势持续升级，且受伊朗战争影响导致减产，油价大幅上涨。【原文：South Korean equities fell, extending last week’s losses, as geopolitical tensions continued to escalate in the Middle East and oil surged on reduced production due to the Iran war.】

item.title: 招聘机构称英国就业市场上月转现乐观
item.description: 一项为英国央行评估英国经济状况提供依据的调查显示，在中东战争爆发前的几周，英国就业市场放缓的态势已显现触底迹象。【原文：Britain’s jobs market slowdown was showing signs of bottoming-out in the weeks before war broke out in the Middle East, according to a survey that feeds into the Bank of England’s thinking on the state of the UK economy.】

item.title: 中国"智能经济"战略推动市场发掘新股赢家
item.description: 投资者对中国建设"智能经济"的举措日益看好，人工智能、半导体及一系列前沿科技领域正成为这项政策推动的受益者。【原文：Investors are growing more upbeat about China’s push to build a “smart economy,” with AI, semiconductors and a range of frontier technology sectors emerging as beneficiaries of the policy drive.】

item.title: 澳大利亚因舆论反弹面临保护伊朗足球队的压力
item.description: 澳大利亚正面临保护伊朗女足"雄狮队"的压力，该队因上周在黄金海岸举行的亚洲女子杯比赛中未唱国歌而遭到国内批评。【原文：Australia is facing pressure to protect the Iranian women’s soccer team, the Lionesses, as the squad faces criticism at home over their failure to sing the national anthem at a Women’s Asian Cup match on the Gold Coast last week.】

item.title: 日本实际工资13个月来首次增长
item.description: 日本工人的实际工资（经通胀调整后）时隔13个月首次出现增长，这一进展可能提振消费者信心，并助力日本央行和政府实现关键政策目标。【原文：Japanese workers’ wages adjusted for inflation rose for the first time in 13 months, a development that may bolster consumer sentiment and support both the Bank of Japan and the government in their pursuit of key policy goals.】

item.title: 宁德时代业绩或扩大对比亚迪1200亿美元市值领先优势
item.description: 宁德时代科技股份有限公司预计将公布强劲季度业绩，这可能使其市值领先于电动汽车制造商比亚迪股份有限公司的优势进一步扩大，从而强化两家企业发展轨迹的分化趋势。【原文：Strong quarterly results expected from Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. may widen its market-capitalization lead over electric-vehicle maker BYD Co., reinforcing the companies’ diverging trajectories.】

item.title: 日本股市下跌，油价飙升，中东局势升级
item.description: 东京股市下跌，因中东局势升级推高油价，且美国就业数据加剧了对经济增长的担忧。【原文：Japanese equities dropped in Tokyo as oil prices surged amid an escalating conflict in the Middle East and after US employment data stoked concerns about growth.】

item.title: 美元因避险需求走高，油价受伊朗战争冲击市场影响
item.description: 随着中东战争不断升级，油价突破每桶100美元大关，避险需求随之攀升，美元兑所有主要货币均走强。【原文：The dollar strengthened against all of its major peers as a deepening war in the Middle East pushed oil prices above $100 per barrel and boosted demand for havens.】

item.title: 德国联邦金融监管局局长认为小型房地产基金风险更大
item.description: 德国金融监管机构联邦金融监管局（BaFin）主席表示，该机构认为开放式房地产基金及其他同类金融产品对私人投资者存在重大风险。【原文：Germany’s top financial watchdog BaFin sees considerable risks for private investors in open-ended real estate funds and other such financial products, its president was quoted as saying.】

item.title: 韩国国债收益率似遇阻力，因韩国央行将推迟加息
item.description: 策略师表示，由于韩国央行优先考虑稳定市场而非实施短期加息，该国短期债券收益率不太可能重现2月份的高点。【原文：South Korea’s shorter-maturity bond yields are unlikely to revisit their February highs as the central bank prioritizes steadying markets over delivering near-term interest-rate hikes, strategists say.】

item.title: 伊朗主导的暴跌诱惑逢低买盘押注亚洲芯片股反弹
item.description: 受战争影响的亚洲股市暴跌正推动全球投资者增加对主要芯片企业的投资，这反映出市场对人工智能热潮能够经受住中东冲突冲击的信心。【原文：A war‑driven meltdown in Asian shares is spurring global investors’ interest in adding exposure to major chip firms, reflecting confidence that the artificial intelligence boom can withstand the Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 金价延续跌势，油价飙升加剧通胀加速担忧
item.description: 受美元走强和通胀风险影响，金价下跌。中东战争已进入第二周，油价飙升至每桶100美元以上。【原文：Gold fell, pressured by a stronger US dollar and inflationary risks, as the war in the Middle East extended into a second week and oil surged above $100 a barrel.】

item.title: 斯塔默承诺支持英国家庭应对油价突破每桶100美元的担忧
item.description: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默提出可能帮助家庭应对飙升的能源账单，因油价已突破每桶100美元，而伊朗战争似乎没有解决的迹象。【原文：UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer raised the prospect of helping households with soaring energy bills as oil prices hit $100 a barrel with little sign of resolution to the war in Iran.】

item.title: 油价突破100美元，战火持续蔓延，美国股指期货下跌：市场综述
item.description: 油价突破每桶100美元，美国股指期货下跌。随着中东地区敌对行动升级，石油运输和基础设施面临的压力不断扩大，全球投资者正为更多动荡做好准备。美元走强，黄金下跌。【原文：Oil rose over $100 a barrel and US stock futures fell as escalating hostilities in the Middle East and widening stress on oil shipping and infrastructure has global investors braced for more turbulence. The dollar gained and gold fell.】

item.title: 油价突破百元大关，伊朗战争迫使更多减产
item.description: 随着更多中东主要产油国削减产量，霍尔木兹海峡持续近乎关闭，以及美国威胁要加剧这场颠覆能源市场的冲突，油价已突破每桶100美元大关。【原文：Oil smashed through $100 a barrel as more major Middle East producers curbed production, the Strait of Hormuz remained all but closed and the US threatened to deepen a conflict that has upended energy markets.】
